◎简　　介  

　　David's classmate Jochem is bullied because he is too heavy. Although David increasingly stands up to the bullying, it turns out to be too late.David的同班同学因为肥胖备受欺凌，尽管David决心帮助他，但事实上还是太晚了。。。
